ingredients.address: 2-1 Yoyogikamizonocho, Shibuya, Tokyo 151-0052
ingredients.entityContext: Liella! hold an outdoor live performance in Yoyogi Park in the episode 12 climax, with Kanon and the group finally singing together in front of a crowd after overcoming their self-doubt. This open green space became the defining image of Liella! performing as a complete unit.
